problem id: dc593799
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00000100 -> 01000001
  01110010 -> 00111100
  10000001 -> 00110000
  10011100 -> 11100111
  10001100 -> 11100011
  11011000 -> 10110110
  11000000 -> 00110000
  10110010 -> 00001100

query: 11101011
predicted answer: 10001010
